ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Ground_Interest__c, "Day 1 Easement"), ISPICKVAL(Ground_Interest__c, "GLBO Related Agreement") ),
OR( ISBLANK(Purchase_Fee__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(Origination__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Business_unit__c)), ISBLANK(Ground_Rent_at_Purchase__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Purchase Fee, Origination, Business Unit, and Monthly Ground at Purchase are required.
